title: AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 Out

detail.title: AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 Out
detail.short_info: AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 released on 12 May 2026. Download provisional answer key PDF, raise objections till 14 May 2026 at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EDCET.

content.text: The AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) for the exam conducted on 8 May 2026.
Direct Link to Download AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 Here

rows: Andhra Pradesh Education Common Entrance Test (AP EDCET)
Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE)

sections.heading: How to Download AP EDCET Answer Key 2026

content.text: Candidates can download the AP EDCET 2026 answer key in PDF format from the official website by following these steps:

items: Visit the official AP EDCET website at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EDCET
Click on the "AP EDCET Answer Key 2026" link or "Response Sheet" link on the homepage
Enter your registration number or hall ticket number and other required details
Submit the details to view the answer key
The answer key PDF will appear on the screen showing all sets (Set A, Set B, Set C, Set D)
Download the answer key PDF corresponding to your question paper set
Save and take a printout for future reference

content.text: Direct Answer Key Link: https://cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EDCET/Edcet/EDCET_ResponseSheet.aspx

sections.heading: How to Raise Objections Against AP EDCET Answer Key 2026

content.text: If candidates find any discrepancies or errors in the provisional answer key, they can raise objections till 14 May 2026 through the following process:

items: Visit the official website at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EDCET
Click on the "Key Objections" option on the homepage
Enter your registration number, hall ticket number, and mobile number
Select the questions you want to challenge along with supporting proof
Submit your objections in the prescribed format within the stipulated time
Keep a printed copy of the submitted objection for future use

content.text: APSCHE will review all objections and release the final answer key based on expert analysis.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using AP EDCET Answer Key 2026

content.text: Candidates can estimate their tentative scores before the official result declaration using the answer key:

items: Download the AP EDCET Answer Key 2026 from cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EDCET
Retrieve your question paper or download it from the official website if lost
Match your answers with those given in the official answer key PDF
Add 1 mark for each correct response
Total all correct answers to arrive at your approximate score

content.text: There is no negative marking in AP EDCET 2026, so only count the correct answers.

The AP EDCET 2026 examination was conducted on 8 May 2026 in two sessions. Session 1 ran from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM covering Mathematics, Biological Science, and Physical Science, while Session 2 ran from 12:30 PM to 02:30 PM covering Social Studies and English. The exam was held in online computer-based mode across various test centers in Andhra Pradesh. AP EDCET is conducted for admission to 2-year Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) and Special Education programmes in university, government, aided, and private colleges across Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates must secure minimum qualifying marks based on their category to be eligible for counselling:

rows: 25% of aggregate marks (37 marks out of 150)

content.text: The final cutoff marks will be determined based on various factors including the number of candidates, difficulty level, and seat availability.
